title: When to Get Professional Help
drDigitalIntro: You don't have to fix every problem yourself. Get professional help when: the Mac won't turn on at all, the screen is cracked, a liquid was spilled inside, you hear grinding noises, or you've tried everything and it's still broken. Apple Support (support.apple.com) offers chat, phone, and in-person help at Apple Stores (Genius Bar). Many community libraries and senior centers also offer free tech help. Asking for help is always the right call.

playgroundTask.question: You accidentally spill coffee on your MacBook keyboard. What should you do immediately?

options.text: Keep using it and hope it dries out on its own
Turn it off immediately, flip it upside down, and take it to Apple for repair
Blow-dry it on high heat to dry the components quickly
Try reinstalling macOS to fix the damage

drDigitalSuccess: Power off immediately and let professionals handle it — liquid inside a Mac can cause serious damage if it stays on or dries in the wrong position.
drDigitalHint: Liquid and electricity don't mix. What's the first priority?
